title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF EMILOD, MUNICIPALITY OF CUYO, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, INTO A BARRIO OF SAID MUNICIPALITY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6183 / 53 OG No. 17, 5511 (September 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1750, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF EMILOD, MUNICIPALITY OF CUYO, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, INTO A BARRIO OF SAID MUNICIPALITY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Emilod, Municipality of Cuyo, Province of Palawan, is converted into a barrio of said Municipality, to be known as the barrio of Emilod.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
